title: Guntakal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Guntakal with a Z-Score of +3.34. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current heat wave in Guntakal has reached critical levels, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature anomaly is significantly high, with a Z-Score of +3.34, indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.7 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, with humidity at 49% and wind speed at 15.8 km/h.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
